scope: major crop physiology, management, and farmer decision domains
description: Expanded generic parameter catalog for web-searching physiological traits, environmental responses, phenology, crop establishment, soil-water-nutrient requirements, yield components, quality traits, and management recommendations across major field crops.

parameters.label: Harvest moisture
parameters.extraction_notes: Extract only explicit harvest moisture thresholds or ranges; ignore storage moisture unless the source ties it to harvest timing.

parameters.label: GDD to anthesis
parameters.decision: Informs flowering prediction, heat risk timing

parameters.label: Vernalization units
parameters.decision: Informs winter crop adaptation, variety selection

parameters.label: Crop coefficient
parameters.extraction_notes: Extract crop coefficient values with their growth-stage context whenever the source provides staged Kc values.

parameters.label: Irrigation trigger
parameters.decision: Informs irrigation scheduling, water stress prevention

parameters.label: Soil salinity threshold
parameters.decision: Informs field selection, irrigation water quality

parameters.label: Nitrogen requirement
parameters.extraction_notes: Extract only crop-specific nitrogen rate recommendations or ranges; preserve yield target, irrigation, and regional qualifiers when stated.

parameters.label: Nitrogen use efficiency
parameters.decision: Informs fertility planning, environmental loss reduction

parameters.label: Salinity tolerance
parameters.decision: Informs field selection, irrigation water quality

parameters.label: Winter hardiness
parameters.decision: Informs variety selection and winter survival risk

parameters.label: Lodging resistance
parameters.decision: Informs variety selection and lodging risk management

parameters.label: Quality class
parameters.decision: Informs variety selection and market fit

parameters.label: Vernalization class
parameters.decision: Informs winter versus spring variety fit

parameters.label: Herbicide application window
parameters.decision: Informs herbicide timing and crop-safety constraints

parameters.label: Nematode pressure
parameters.decision: Informs rotation, resistant variety, and field selection decisions

parameters.label: Safe storage moisture
parameters.decision: Informs drying target and storage risk

parameters.label: Drying temperature limit
parameters.decision: Informs dryer setup and quality protection

parameters.label: Quality grade threshold
parameters.decision: Informs quality grading and market destination

parameters.label: Storage pest monitoring
parameters.decision: Informs storage pest scouting and treatment decisions

parameters.label: Seed cost
parameters.decision: Informs enterprise budgeting and seeding-rate tradeoffs

parameters.label: Fertilizer cost
parameters.decision: Informs fertility budgeting and input-cost risk

parameters.label: Irrigation cost
parameters.decision: Informs irrigation economics and water-allocation decisions

parameters.label: Harvest cost
parameters.decision: Informs harvest budgeting and custom-hire decisions

parameters.label: Expected gross margin
parameters.decision: Informs crop choice and enterprise comparison

parameters.label: Rotation interval
parameters.decision: Informs rotation design and disease-break planning

parameters.label: Residue management
parameters.decision: Informs residue, tillage, and seedbed decisions
